name: MK Fashion Animated HTML Banner
description: Create a premium animated HTML banner page for a fashion brand called MK Fashion. The page should look like a modern promotional video banner with HTML + CSS + JavaScript only (no frameworks). Text animations should appear one after another with smooth transitions. The text sequence is: "Welcome to MK Fashion", "Experience Our Newly Upgraded Features", "Discover Complete Fashion with the Latest Trends", "Organic Products & Homemade Pickles – Pure & Natural", "Custom Designed Styles Made Just for You", "Shop Now". Each text should animate with fade + slide + glow effect, appearing one-by-one every 2–3 seconds. Add smooth cinematic transitions between slides, modern gradient animated backgrounds, particle or floating fashion-themed elements, premium Google fonts, and subtle zoom / parallax effects. The design style should be luxury fashion brand style, dark gradient backgrounds with neon highlights, smooth glowing typography, fullscreen layout (100vh), and mobile responsive. Extra features include an animated CTA button for "Shop Now", continuously looping background animation, and a total animation duration of ~15 seconds then repeat. The design should look like a high-end Instagram fashion ad or Apple-style landing animation. The output should be a single clean HTML file with embedded CSS and JavaScript, saved to D:\nexus-os\outputs\mk_fashion_banner.html.

name: MK Fashion Animated HTML Banner
description: Define the full scope of the premium animated HTML banner page for MK Fashion, including all specified animations, design elements, and responsiveness. Delegate the technical design to an Architect and the implementation to a Fullstack Developer. Oversee the entire project lifecycle and ensure the final output meets all requirements, delivering a single HTML file to D:\nexus-os\outputs\mk_fashion_banner.html.
